steps.title: Vertex form shortcut: write the parabola using $(9, -14)$
steps.content: Vertex form: $y = a(x-9)^2 - 14$. Two x-intercepts with vertex below the x-axis ($-14 < 0$) requires $a > 0$ (opens upward).

steps.title: $a + b + c = f(1)$: evaluate at $x = 1$
steps.content: $$f(1) = a(1-9)^2 - 14 = 64a - 14$$Since $a > 0$, $f(1) > -14$. Only choice $-12 > -14$. That matches choice D — D is correct.
